rationale: Vivid, clear, and well-organized profile built around a single workday. Concrete details—the case count, courthouse scenes, client examples, and procedural moments—make the subject feel real and informed. The voice is humane and engaging. It loses a point on simplicity and economy because some phrasing is slightly literary and the piece runs a bit long for its core point.
